evaluators.name: Cheapest 60-Min Evening Running Consultation Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added to cart a 60-min running technique consultation after 5 pm next Tuesday, and that the chosen slot is the cheapest among all qualifying options, for one attendee.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated 4-Week Stress Program Enrollment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added to cart a 4-week stress management program under $120 with rating ≥ 4.5, using a standard tier and (indirectly) a valid start date, and that it is the highest-rated qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Two Saturday Morning Moderate Group Classes Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked two different moderate-intensity group classes on the same upcoming Saturday morning, each under 45 minutes, at least 30 minutes apart, with one attendee each.

evaluators.name: Weekly Training Plan Workouts Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that across saved training plan items, the user scheduled a Monday cardio workout under 30 minutes, a Wednesday strength workout between 30 and 45 minutes, and a Friday mobility or stretching workout of at least 20 minutes.

evaluators.name: Best-Value Nutrition Bundle Under $250 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added to cart a nutrition coaching bundle under $250 and that it is the better-value option (more total minutes) among the two cheapest qualifying bundles.

evaluators.name: Free 7-Day Wellbeing Email Challenge Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered for a free 7-day wellbeing-focused email challenge starting next Monday at 8:00 am with both sleep and mindfulness themes selected.

evaluators.name: Three Short Wellbeing Articles Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved to their reading list three short articles: one on running injury prevention, one on mental resilience, and one on nutrition, each with estimated read time under 10 minutes.

evaluators.name: Monthly Gym + Yoga Subscription Under $180 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user built a monthly subscription by adding a monthly gym-access membership and a monthly yoga class add-on with at least one class per week, keeping their combined monthly price under $180.
